original_image_tags: A piece of Hotel Gralynn stationery with a handwritten letter in cursive script.

elements.description: A hotel letterhead logo featuring a small coat of arms with a lion above a horizontal bar, the word 'GRALYNN' on a ribbon below, and the text 'HOTEL Gralynn' and 'MIAMI, FLORIDA' printed around it. Two black circular hole punch marks are visible at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the image is Hotel Gralynn stationery/letterhead, but Description B adds specific visual details (coat of arms with lion, ribbon, 'MIAMI, FLORIDA', hole punch marks) that Description A omits, with no direct contradictions.
